title: Mister Rui Paint Rollers, Mohair Paint Roller, Wool Blend Paint Roller 4" (100MM), Mini Roller Sleeves, 4 Inch Roller Sleeves, Small Rollers for Painting on Flat Surfaces, Pack of 10
features: 10 wool blended with polyester paint roller covers in a set, used with water- and oil-based paints, like varnish, latex, primer, and stain
Mini roller sleeves of wool and polyester fabric material is used on flat surfaces, like doors, cupboards, and fences
Wool blend paint rollers with short pile 4mm has even release of paints, and no dents and dings in the paintwork
Mini paint roller covers of good pile toughness, thus bringing smooth painting effect and fine texture
4 Inch roller sleeves will be matched with all 4" standard roller frame ( 6mm wire ), then bring flexible rolling experience
description: Product Description 4 INCH WOOL BLEND PAINT ROLLER Short Pile 4MM Wool Blend Paint Roller Even release of paint, no dents and dings in the paintwork Good for flat surfaces 4 Inch Roller Frame Zinc-coated stainless steel roller frame, not easy to get rust, and will be matched with other 4" standard roller covers Pack of 10 Includes: Wool and polyester blend paint roller cover*10 Pack of 21 Includes: Wool and polyester blend paint roller cover*20 4 Inch roller frame*1 Pack of 10 Pack of 21 Used on flat surfaces, like doors, cupboards, cabinets, tables, and fences Smooth painting effect Even Release
